blended.narrative: Cascade Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 31 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 45°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 15" of heavy snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 12" of heavy snow, highs of 27°F, winds around 23 mph. Expect powder.
Tuesday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
